records.question: Which tracks have a file size that is exactly 6735408 bytes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT track.trackid FROM track
JOIN mediatype ON track.mediatypeid = mediatype.mediatypeid
WHERE track.bytes = 6735408
records.pred_sql: SELECT TrackId FROM Track WHERE Bytes = 6735408

records.question: Which tracks named Corazon Espinado have the composer F. Olivera and a unit price of 0.99?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT track.trackid FROM track
WHERE track.composer = 'F. Olivera' AND track.name = 'Corazon Espinado' AND track.unitprice = 0.99
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Track.TrackId
FROM Track
WHERE Track.Name = 'Corazon Espinado'
  AND Track.Composer = 'F. Olivera'
  AND Track.UnitPrice = 0.99

records.question: Which tracks named Revolta Olodum are at least 230191 milliseconds long, have at least 7557065 bytes, cost at least 0.99, are MPEG audio files, and have invoiceline unit prices of at least 0.99 with quantities of at most 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT track.trackid FROM track
JOIN invoiceline ON track.trackid = invoiceline.trackid
JOIN mediatype ON track.mediatypeid = mediatype.mediatypeid
WHERE track.milliseconds >= 230191 AND track.name = 'Revolta Olodum' AND invoiceline.unitprice >= 0.99 AND track.bytes >= 7557065 AND mediatype.name = 'MPEG audio file' AND track.unitprice >= 0.99 AND invoiceline.quantity <= 1
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Track.TrackId
FROM Track
JOIN MediaType ON Track.MediaTypeId = MediaType.MediaTypeId
JOIN InvoiceLine ON Track.TrackId = InvoiceLine.TrackId
WHERE Track.Name = 'Revolta Olodum'
  AND Track.Milliseconds >= 230191
  AND Track.Bytes >= 7557065
  AND Track.UnitPrice >= 0.99
  AND MediaType.Name = 'MPEG audio file'
  AND InvoiceLine.UnitPrice >= 0.99
  AND InvoiceLine.Quantity <= 1

records.question: Which tracks named Alive, composed by Stone Gossard, have a unit price of at most 0.99, a file size of no more than 11176623 bytes, last at least 341080 milliseconds, and are in the MPEG audio file format?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT track.trackid FROM track
JOIN mediatype ON track.mediatypeid = mediatype.mediatypeid
WHERE track.unitprice <= 0.99 AND track.bytes <= 11176623 AND track.name = 'Alive' AND track.milliseconds >= 341080 AND mediatype.name = 'MPEG audio file' AND track.composer = 'Stone Gossard'

FROM Track
JOIN MediaType ON Track.MediaTypeId = MediaType.MediaTypeId
WHERE Track.Name = 'Alive'
  AND Track.Composer = 'Stone Gossard'
  AND Track.UnitPrice <= 0.99
  AND Track.Bytes <= 11176623
  AND Track.Milliseconds >= 341080
  AND MediaType.Name = 'MPEG audio file'

records.question: Which tracks named Gates Of Tomorrow on the album Dance Of Death cost at most $0.99 and have a file size of at most 12482688 bytes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT track.trackid FROM track
JOIN invoiceline ON track.trackid = invoiceline.trackid
JOIN album ON track.albumid = album.albumid
WHERE track.unitprice <= 0.99 AND track.name = 'Gates Of Tomorrow' AND album.title = 'Dance Of Death' AND track.bytes <= 12482688
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Track.TrackId
FROM Track
JOIN Album ON Track.AlbumId = Album.AlbumId
WHERE Track.Name = 'Gates Of Tomorrow'
  AND Album.Title = 'Dance Of Death'
  AND Track.UnitPrice <= 0.99
  AND Track.Bytes <= 12482688

records.question: Which tracks were composed exactly by Apocalyptica?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT track.trackid FROM track
JOIN album ON track.albumid = album.albumid
JOIN artist ON album.artistid = artist.artistid
WHERE track.composer = 'Apocalyptica'
records.pred_sql: SELECT TrackId FROM Track WHERE Composer = 'Apocalyptica'

records.question: What track named Everything's Ruined from the album Angel Dust by Faith No More has a length of exactly 273658 milliseconds, a size of exactly 9010917 bytes, and a unit price of exactly 0.99?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT track.trackid FROM track
JOIN album ON track.albumid = album.albumid
JOIN artist ON album.artistid = artist.artistid

  AND Track.Milliseconds = 273658
  AND Track.Bytes = 9010917

records.question: What tracks are exactly 358948 milliseconds long and belong to the Rock genre?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT track.trackid FROM track
JOIN invoiceline ON track.trackid = invoiceline.trackid
JOIN genre ON track.genreid = genre.genreid
WHERE track.milliseconds = 358948 AND genre.name = 'Rock'

SELECT Track.TrackId
FROM Track
JOIN Genre ON Track.GenreId = Genre.GenreId
WHERE Track.Milliseconds = 358948
